en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: WITH STRINGED INSTRUMENTS. A PSALM. A SONG. May God be gracious to us and bless us and make his face to shine upon us, Selah
zh: 願 神恩待我們，賜福給我們， 願他用臉光照我們，

en: that your way may be known on earth, your saving power among all nations.
zh: 好使全地得知你的道路， 萬國得知你的救恩。

en: Let the peoples praise you, O God; let all the peoples praise you!
zh: 神啊！願眾民都稱謝你， 願萬民都稱謝你。

en: Let the nations be glad and sing for joy, for you judge the peoples with equity and guide the nations upon earth. Selah
zh: 願萬族都快樂歡呼， 因為你按正直統管眾民， 並引導地上的萬族。

en: Let the peoples praise you, O God; let all the peoples praise you!
zh: 神啊！願眾民都稱謝你， 願萬民都稱謝你。

en: The earth has yielded its increase; God, our God, shall bless us.
zh: 地生出土產； 神，就是我們的 神，要賜福給我們。

en: God shall bless us; let all the ends of the earth fear him!
zh: 神要賜福給我們， 全地都要敬畏他。 歌一首，大衛的詩，交給詩班長。
